title: Cross-Chain Liquidity Map
body: Visualise liquidity distribution across pools and chains for any token pair.

title: DeFi Bad Debt Monitor
body: Identify and track under-collateralised positions and bad debt accumulation in lending protocols.

title: DeFi Position Tracker
body: Track LP positions, lending supply, borrow exposure, and yield across DeFi protocols.

title: DEX Trade History
body: Pull all DEX swap events and volume for any wallet address or token pair.

title: Liquidity Pool Monitor
body: Monitor pool reserves, APY, and impermanent loss across major AMMs in real time.

title: Protocol Revenue Feed
body: Real-time and historical fee revenue data for leading DeFi protocols onchain.

title: RWA Real Estate Portfolio
body: Aggregate and value tokenized real estate assets held in any wallet across chains.

title: RWA Tokenized Treasury Tracker
body: Monitor tokenized T-bill and treasury product flows, yields, and on-chain supply.

title: Stablecoin Dominance Tracker
body: Track stablecoin supply share, peg deviation, and flow dominance across chains.

title: Yield Dashboard
body: Compare DeFi yields across lending and liquidity protocols onchain.
